comment: Phase-followups closeout baseline (2026-05-03). The diff harness now ATTACHes bc_remote.db (the published-parquet reference) and compares it against the local dev rebuild under DEV_ONLY mode. The upstream Retrosheet doubleheader fix has landed in the source parquet (verified directly: box_score.box_score_games returns DoubleHeaderGame1/Game2 for BRO 1904-05-30). The 556 (model, column) pairs here reflect the prod-vs-dev gap from this rebuild: bc_remote.db still points to the previously-published parquet, which predates the dev refresh, so direction-stat drift (pulled / opposite-field) and the partial-coverage SUM cluster (1901-07 BFP, 1903-09 ER, pre-1920 SB/CS, pre-1933 GIDP, pre-1954 SF, pre-1955 IBB) noted in notes/phase-2-followups.md still show. Re-capture after each fresh prod publish.
